title: Airtop node cannot read properties of undefined
symptom: When attempting to upload a file using the Airtop node, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'data')'. This prevents the file upload from completing.
applies_when: File data is expected from a previous node
not_this_if: The error does not occur when using other nodes
The file upload is successful without errors
root_cause: The error occurs because the binary file data is not being passed correctly to the Airtop node. This typically happens when the node that retrieves the file data (like Google Drive) is not positioned correctly in the workflow, leading to undefined data being accessed.
fix_steps: Rearrange the workflow to place the Google Drive node before the Airtop node
Ensure the Google Drive node outputs the binary data correctly
Retry the upload operation in the Airtop node
agent_instruction: Rearrange the workflow to ensure the Google Drive node is before the Airtop node.
